entities.name: SOIL DEGRADATION INDEX
entities.description: A composite parameter used to monitor and quantify soil degradation.

entities.name: SOIL DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in soil quality and productivity in agricultural landscapes.

entities.name: DIFFUSE REFLECTANCE SPECTROSCOPY
entities.description: A rapid soil testing method used to estimate soil parameters and indices.

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA, INDIA
entities.description: The degradation-prone dryland landscape where the study was conducted.

entities.name: MINIMUM DATASET APPROACH
entities.description: A method used to identify the smallest number of key parameters required to formulate the soil degradation index.

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON CONTENT
entities.description: A key soil parameter used as an indicator for the soil degradation index.

entities.name: SOIL ERODIBILITY INDEX
entities.description: A key soil parameter used as an indicator for the soil degradation index.

entities.name: AVAILABLE S
entities.description: A key soil parameter used as an indicator for the soil degradation index.

entities.name: AVAILABLE MN
entities.description: A key soil parameter used as an indicator for the soil degradation index.

entities.name: EXCHANGEABLE CA TO MG RATIO
entities.description: A key soil parameter used as an indicator for the soil degradation index.

entities.name: SILT CONTENT
entities.description: A key soil parameter used as an indicator for the soil degradation index.

entities.name: MULTISPECTRAL IMAGING
entities.description: A remote sensing technique used to extract spectral data for estimating soil indices.

entities.name: SENTINEL-2 L2A
entities.description: A satellite providing multispectral imaging data over the visible to infrared region.

entities.name: VNIR REGION
entities.description: The visible to infrared spectral region used for reflectance data collection.

entities.name: SUPPORT VECTOR REGRESSION
entities.description: A chemometric model used to estimate the soil degradation index from spectral data.

entities.name: PARTIAL-LEAST-SQUARES REGRESSION
entities.description: A feature selection-based chemometric model used to estimate the soil degradation index from spectral data.

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity measured to analyze the impact of soil degradation.

entities.name: RAINFED CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown without irrigation that show yield declines as soil degradation increases.

entities.name: IRRIGATED CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown with irrigation that do not show yield declines associated with soil degradation.

entities.name: IRRIGATION MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A practice in dryland areas that may circumvent the challenges of land degradation.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The broad agricultural landscape context of the study.
